content.problemStatement:
Chef is planning a party and wants to invite competitive programmers from Chefland. Chef will arrange the seating of the programmers around a **circular** table.

Each programmer has a star rating associated to them. Some competitive programmers are ratists, meaning they do not want to sit adjacent to any programmer with **lesser** star rating than them; otherwise, they become sad.

There are NNN competitive programmers in Chefland.

You are given an array AAA of length NNN, where AiA_iAi​ represents the star rating of the ithi^{th}ith programmer.

You are also given a **binary** string SSS of length NNN, where Si=1S_i = 1Si​=1 indicates that the ithi^{th}ith programmer is a ratist, and vice-versa.

Determine the **maximum** number of programmers Chef can invite such that there is a seating arrangement where no programmer is sad.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of three lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains one integer NNN, the number of programmers in Chefland.
The second line of each test case contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​, denoting the star rating of each programmer.
The next line contains the binary string SSS of length NNN denoting whether a programmer is ratist.




Output Format
For each test case, print a single integer, denoting the **maximum** number of programmers Chef can invite such that there is a seating arrangement where no programmer is sad.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 4⋅1054\cdot 10^54⋅105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: Since there is only one programmer, they can sit alone without being sad.
Test case 222: No programmer is ratist, so they can sit in any manner.

Test case 333: It can be shown that at most 444 programmers can sit together without being sad. We can choose programmers 1,2,3,41, 2, 3, 41,2,3,4 to sit together in the following manner.
